prompt: Build a CRM with contacts, companies, and deals. Users should be able to track interactions, set reminders, and view a dashboard with sales pipeline metrics. Admin and sales rep roles.
Create an e-commerce store with products, categories, shopping cart, order management, and Stripe checkout. Admin can manage inventory, customers can browse and buy. Include order status tracking.
Build a project management tool like Trello. Teams can create boards, add lists and cards. Cards have assignees, due dates, labels, and comments. Team admin and member roles.

Healthcare appointment booking system. Patients can browse doctors by specialty, book appointments, and view medical history. Doctors can manage their schedule and view patient records. Admin manages the system.
Learning management system with courses, lessons, quizzes, and student progress tracking. Instructors create content, students enroll and complete courses. Include certificates on completion.
Inventory management system for a warehouse. Track products, stock levels, suppliers, purchase orders, and shipments. Alert when stock is low. Manager and warehouse staff roles.
A blogging platform where users can write posts with categories and tags, add images, and comment on posts. Authors and readers roles. Include a featured posts section on the homepage.

Event booking platform. Organizers create events with dates, venues, and ticket tiers. Attendees browse events, purchase tickets, and get QR code confirmations. Include event analytics for organizers.

HR employee portal. Employees can view their profile, submit leave requests, check payslips, and see company announcements. HR managers approve leaves and manage employee records. Department-based access.
A social media app where users create profiles, post updates with photos, follow other users, like and comment on posts. Include a feed algorithm showing followed users' posts and trending content.
